privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to design a 3D cylindrical spacer from a blank SolveSpace canvas and export it. Verified constraints explicitly required by the task description and verifier logic include an outer diameter of 24.0 mm, an inner hole diameter of 8.0 mm, and an extruded height of 12.0 mm. The expected output file paths are /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.slvs for the project and /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.stl for the exported mesh.
